testcase.name: people.csv
testcase.failure: Line 2: BUSINESS detected with 75.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: alice@example.com Validator: email Line 3: BUSINESS detected with 75.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: bob@example.org Validator: email Line 2: SSN detected with 75.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: 449-87-4100 Validator: ssn Line 3: SSN detected with 75.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: 529-11-2233 Validator: ssn Line 3: MASTERCARD detected with 25.0% confidence (LOW) Match: 5425233430109903 Validator: creditcard Line 2: VISA detected with 25.0% confidence (LOW) Match: 4532015112830366 Validator: creditcard
